post.summary: Creates a new doctor account. Admin only.

requestBody.description: Doctor details (e.g., name, university code, email, password).

400.description: Validation failed or university code/email already in use.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

post.summary: Creates a new teaching assistant (TA) account. Admin only.

requestBody.description: TA details (e.g., name, university code, email, password).

400.description: Validation failed or university code/email already in use.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

get.summary: Returns a list of all registered doctors.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

get.summary: Returns a list of all registered teaching assistants (TAs).

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

post.summary: Assigns a staff member (doctor or TA) to a course by course code and staff university code.

parameters.name: staffUniversityCode
parameters.description: University code of the staff member to assign.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g., already assigned or invalid codes).

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin or Doctor role required.

404.description: Course or staff member not found.

post.summary: Creates a new course. Admin can create any course; Doctor can create courses they are allowed to manage.

400.description: Validation failed or course code already exists.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin or Doctor role required.

get.summary: Returns a list of all courses in the system.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

delete.summary: Deletes a course by ID. Admin can delete any course; Doctor only courses they are allowed to manage.

parameters.name: courseId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the course to delete.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin or Doctor role required.

403.description: Forbidden; doctor does not have permission to delete this course.

delete.summary: Permanently deletes a user (any role) by university code. Admin only.

parameters.name: universityCode
parameters.description: University code of the user to delete.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

post.summary: Creates multiple student accounts in a single request.

requestBody.description: List of student records (e.g., name, university code, email).

200.description: Bulk creation completed; returns summary of created and failed records.

400.description: Validation failed for one or more records.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

post.summary: Deletes multiple students by their IDs in a single request.

requestBody.description: List of student IDs to delete.

400.description: Invalid or empty list of IDs.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

post.summary: Resets a student account (e.g., clear password, reactivate) by university code.

requestBody.description: University code of the student to reset.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

post.summary: Resets the system for a new academic year (e.g., clears attendance/session data while preserving users and courses).

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

get.summary: Returns the total count of registered doctors.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

get.summary: Returns the total count of registered teaching assistants (TAs).

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

get.summary: Returns the total count of registered students.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

get.summary: Returns the total count of courses in the system.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Admin role required.

post.summary: Submits attendance for the authenticated student (e.g., via QR code scan or session token).

requestBody.description: Attendance data including session identifier and optional verification token.

400.description: Invalid session, duplicate submission, or session not open for attendance.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Student role required.

get.summary: Returns the list of attendees for a given session, with optional search filter.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional search string to filter attendees by name or code.

200.description: List of session attendees returned successfully.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT required.

post.summary: Manually adds a student's attendance for a session (e.g., late arrival or technical issue). Doctor or TA only.

requestBody.description: Manual attendance payload (session ID, student identifier, optional notes).

400.description: Invalid request or student already marked present.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor or TA role required.

403.description: Forbidden; staff not assigned to the course.

delete.summary: Removes a student's attendance record for a specific session. Doctor or TA only.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor or TA role required.

403.description: Forbidden; staff not assigned to the course.

404.description: Session, student, or attendance record not found.

get.summary: Returns the lecture attendance report for a course, with optional total marks for grading. Doctor only.

parameters.name: totalMarks
parameters.description: Optional total marks to compute attendance-based grades.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor role required.

403.description: Forbidden; doctor not assigned to this course.

get.summary: Returns the section (e.g., lab/tutorial) attendance report for a course, with optional total marks. Doctor or TA.

parameters.name: totalMarks
parameters.description: Optional total marks to compute attendance-based grades.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor or TA role required.

403.description: Forbidden; staff not assigned to this course.

get.summary: Returns absence warnings for a course (e.g., students at risk of failing attendance). Doctor only.

200.description: List of absence warnings returned successfully.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor role required.

403.description: Forbidden; doctor not assigned to this course.

post.summary: Activates a user account using the provided activation token and new password.

requestBody.description: Activation payload containing the activation token and new password.

400.description: Invalid token, expired token, or password does not meet policy requirements.

404.description: User or activation token not found.

429.description: Too many activation attempts; rate limit exceeded.

post.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT access token and refresh token.

requestBody.description: Login credentials (e.g., university code and password).

200.description: Login successful; returns access and refresh tokens.

400.description: Invalid credentials or account not yet activated.

429.description: Too many login attempts; rate limit exceeded.

post.summary: Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token and optionally a new refresh token.

401.description: Refresh token rejected or revoked.

get.summary: Returns the list of courses assigned to the authenticated doctor or TA.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor or TA role required.

post.summary: Enrolls a single student in a course. Doctor or Admin only.

requestBody.description: Enrollment data (course identifier and student identifier).

400.description: Invalid request or student already enrolled.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor or Admin role required.

403.description: Forbidden; doctor not allowed to enroll in this course.

get.summary: Returns the list of courses the authenticated student is enrolled in.

200.description: List of student courses returned successfully.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Student role required.

post.summary: Enrolls multiple students in a course in a single request. Doctor or Admin only.

requestBody.description: Bulk enrollment data (course identifier and list of student identifiers).

200.description: Bulk enrollment completed; returns summary of successes and failures.

400.description: Invalid request or validation errors for one or more students.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor or Admin role required.

403.description: Forbidden; doctor not allowed to enroll in this course.

get.summary: Returns the number of students enrolled in the specified course.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor, TA, or Admin role required.

get.summary: Returns the list of students enrolled in a course, with optional search filter.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Optional search string to filter students by name or code.

200.description: List of enrolled students returned successfully.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor, TA, or Admin role required.

post.summary: Creates a new attendance session (lecture or section) for a course. Doctor or TA only.

requestBody.description: Session details (course ID, type, location, radius, etc.).

200.description: Session created successfully; returns session details including QR code data.

400.description: Validation failed or conflicting session exists.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor or TA role required.

403.description: Forbidden; staff not assigned to the course.

put.summary: Updates the allowed attendance radius (in meters) for an active session. Doctor or TA only.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor or TA role required.

403.description: Forbidden; staff not authorized to manage this session.

post.summary: Rotates the QR code for a session (invalidates current code and generates a new one). Doctor or TA only.

200.description: QR code rotated successfully; new code returned.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor or TA role required.

put.summary: Stops an active session so no further attendance can be submitted. Doctor or TA only.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor or TA role required.

403.description: Forbidden; staff not authorized to manage this session.

put.summary: Resumes a previously stopped session so attendance can be submitted again. Doctor or TA only.

400.description: Session already active or invalid state.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor or TA role required.

get.summary: Returns sessions for a course filtered by type (e.g., lecture, section).

200.description: List of matching sessions returned successfully.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT required.

get.summary: Opens a Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream for live attendance updates for a session. Doctor, TA, or Admin only.

200.description: SSE stream established; events contain status, attendee count, and attendee list.

401.description: Unauthorized; valid JWT with Doctor, TA, or Admin role required.

get.summary: Returns a sample weather forecast list. Used for API testing and template demonstration.

200.description: List of weather forecasts returned successfully.

Bearer.description: Write 'Bearer' then 'space' then paste the token
Bearer.name: Authorization
